message:
test(bd-8zle): cover TestClient constructors, accessors, and ID counter

Add 8 tests to testing/client.rs: with_cx, with_capabilities,
pre-init getters, Debug output, transport accessors, close,
request_id auto-increment, and ensure_initialized error message
(3 → 11 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
